name: Cube Zones Texture VK
description: XR_DXR_display_zones TEXTURE-class parity test (ADR-027), Vulkan leg: a VK/D3D11 hybrid that proves a shared-texture app receives the full multi-zone composite (two 3D zones + Local2D strip + wish mask) written back into its D3D11 KMT shared texture by the runtime's Vulkan compositor (M=wish mode, O=overlap toggle).
